title: aquilina pyrenaea
intro: Aquilina pyrenaea, also known as Pyrenean aquilina, is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aquilina pyrenaea include relief from digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Aquilina pyrenaea is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used in tincture or ointment form for topical application.
